subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue Lauriston 97 in Paris, 1913-03-27
subcodes.first_line: Fifty years ago Bahá'u'lláh prophesied: 'Adrianople shall go out of the hand of the Sultan' and today that prophecy is fulfilled.... It is evident that negligence from God brings a nation to this path; lack of sound administration
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
